titleStmt.title: SII 30.6: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 6. (A.R. No. 6 of 1915.) Madurai, Madurai Taluk, Madurai District. Sundarēśvara temple-on the a pillar in the same gōpura Chokkanātha-Nāyaka: Śaka 1632: Kara, Paṅguṉi 10, Āyilyam: 1710 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription states that the resettlement of the four villages given to the sixty-four persons as sarvamāṉya, who were the bearers of the god (image) Chokkanāthasvāmin earlier. However the arrangement was cancelled later. Unable to put up with this one person committed suicide by jumping down from the top of the gōpura of the temple. This convinced the ruler to confirm the grant as sarvamānya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
cuvattiśrī . cakāttam
1000 6 100 3 10 2 Itaṉmel cellā
niṉṟa kara varuṣam paṅkuṉi mātam 10 nāḷ
pūṟuvapakṣattu Ekāteciyum
Āyiliya naṭcettiramum cuka
ṟka nāmayokamum pattirava
karaṇamum tiravācamum peṟṟa
cupatinattil rācātirācaṉ rāca
paramecuraṉ rācamāttāṇṭaṉ
raṅkatīpamaṇi muttuvīrappa nāya
kkaraiyaṉavarkaḷ kumārar vi
ceyaraṅkac cokkanāta nāyakka
raiyaṉavarkaḷ rācciya paripālaṉa
m paṇṇukaiyil rācaśrīkumāra ta
ḷavāy kattūriraṅkayyaṉava
rkaḷ taḷakattam paṇṇukaiyi
l rācaśrī veṅkiṭa kiṭṭaṇayyaṉa
varkaḷ piṟatāṉikkattil matu
raik koṭṭait taḷakattañ co
kkappaṉāyakkar nāḷaiyil ci
rmai maṇiyamuttampala mutali
yāravarkaḷ maṇiyattil campiṟuti
(ṟuti) cīṉappayyaṉavarkaḷ koyi
l maṇiyam vaḷappūr mutaliyār ta
lattār Aṉantakuṇa vikkiṟapāṇ
ṭiyapaṭṭar kulacekaramuttaṇṇā
vipaṭṭar taṟpuruṣateva tiruma
laikkuṭṭi mutaliyār periyatevamutta mu
taliyār viḻuppātarāya muttaiya
ṉivarkaḷ nāḷaiyil cokkaṉāta cu
vāmi cīrpātantāṅkuvār cellamu
tali kaṇṇiṟaiñcāmutali cokkamutali
kaṇṭiya tevamutali Inta nālukaraikku
ḷpaṭṭa 6 10 4 perukkuñ caṟuvamāṉipap
paṭṭaiyaṅ kuṭuttapaṭi yivarkaḷala
kkaic ceruvaikku naṭakkiṟa kiṟā
mam meykāval nīṅkalākac cāmanatta
m cikkālai puṅkaṅkuḻam ciṅkuḻam yin
ta nālukiṟāmamum Aṉupavittuk koṇ
ṭu varumiṭattil Aramaṉaiyār yinta kiṟāma
ṅkaḷukku poṟuppeṉṟum yāviṉai
yeṉṟu mikutiyum cillarai paṇṇiṉa
paṭiyiṉāle cīrpātantāṅkiya AṉaRead- aṉaivarum
varuñ caṉṉatip poy kopuravācali
le vantu cākilameṉṟu kūṭṭaṅ
kūṭik kopuṟattileṟi Āṇṭimutali maka
ṉ cokkamutali viḻuntu cettapaṭi
yiṉāle talattārellāruṅ
koyil vācalile kūṭṭaṅkūṭi
nālu vācalun tirukkāppuk
koṇṭu maruttu ttil ke
ṭṭai kaṭṭaḷai cokkappanāyak
karavarkaḷ cīrmai maṇiyam muttam
pala mutaliyāravarkaḷ campiṟuti
cīṉappayaṉavarkaḷ tiṉacarikāṟar
mutalāṉa cakalamāṉavar perum ko
pura vācalile vantirukkum tala
ttārellāraiyumaḻaippit
tu vaiccukkoṇṭu nālu karai
cciripātan tāṅkuvārkaḷaiyu
maḻaippiccu vaittuk ko
ṇṭu ciripātan tāṅkuvārkaḷuk
ku naṭakkiṟa nālu kiṟāmattukku ka
rttarkaḷ nirupappaṭikku po
ṟuppu yāviṉai Oṉṟum te
vaiyillaiyeṉṟu caṟuvamāṉiya
māka kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭom .
Digital edition of SII 30.6 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
